creator: sunpoet@FreeBSD.org
text:
- Move devel/py-gflags to devel/py-python-gflags
- Update to 3.1.0
- Add LICENSE_FILE
- Add NO_ARCH
- Relax USES=python
- Allow concurrent installation (USE_PYTHON=concurrent)
- Remove PROJECTHOST
- Update WWW

Changes:        https://github.com/google/python-gflags/releases
